title: Workbench Errors
summary: W04 Activity (2 of 2): Workbench Errors This activity helps you practice troubleshooting SQL errors. Is is implemented as an Canvas Quiz, It is NOT a quiz (in the sense of a test), though the quiz tool is used to present the activity to you.
